description_long: This is a large, two-story suburban house surrounded by a white perimeter wall and lush landscaping. The front facade features a prominent entryway with columns, a covered porch, and symmetrical windows, giving it a stately appearance. The property includes a spacious backyard with a swimming pool, lounge chairs, and a separate outdoor structure, possibly a gazebo or pool house. Mature trees and manicured hedges provide privacy and greenery around the house. The roof is dark and gabled, with multiple sections and varying heights, adding architectural interest. The overall design blends traditional and modern elements, with clean lines, large windows, and a balanced layout.
description: A large, two-story suburban house with a gabled roof, white exterior, landscaped yard, and a backyard pool. The property is enclosed by a white wall and features symmetrical windows and a prominent entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with columns, covered porch, and symmetrical windows, flanked by trees and a white perimeter wall.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, garage doors, and additional landscaping, with the backyard structure visible in the distance.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a swimming pool, lounge area, and outdoor structure, as well as large windows and garden features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing dense hedges, the side of the house, and the outdoor structure, with less emphasis on the main entry.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with columns, covered porch, steps, and decorative trim
